object_under_evaluation: integrity of contradiction-visible memo consumption on lifecycle-aware object recall paths
claim_boundary: On the selected Phase Alpha runtime evidence path, the contradiction lane remains a gap finding: contradiction_map.json and memory_delta.json preserve general contradiction and memo-delta evidence, but no lifecycle-aware object recall rerun exercised superseded, retracted, or still-open memo objects. This report records the blocker only, not contradiction readiness.
limitations: This report reads the selected Phase Alpha runtime evidence only.
This report does not prove contradiction handling quality.
This report does not prove contradiction resolution.
This report does not prove lifecycle-aware object recall over superseded or retracted memo objects.
This report does not make aoa-memo-contradiction-integrity export-ready.
This report does not replace a future contradiction rerun with explicit memo object evidence.
This report does not prove permission or authority safety from memo fields.
This report does not prove promotion discipline or merge-hallucination resistance.
case_family: phase-alpha-memo-contradiction-gap-v1 selected runtime gap evidence over memo-contradiction-guardrail-v1
strongest_contradiction_signal: The Phase Alpha runtime evidence keeps contradiction_map.json and memory_delta.json visible, so the gap is inspectable instead of silently disappearing behind the recall rerun.
strongest_contradiction_risk: The evidence path never becomes a lifecycle-aware object recall run, so superseded, retracted, and still-open memo contradiction posture remains untested.

case_notes.lifecycle_note: The runtime contradiction map is useful gap evidence, but it does not expose lifecycle review_state over selected memo objects.
case_notes.current_recall_note: No current_recall status over superseded, withdrawn, or still-open memo objects was exercised on this path.
case_notes.contradiction_note: Contradiction posture stays visible only as a general runtime contradiction map, not as object-level contradiction_refs.
case_notes.audit_or_replacement_note: No replacement, withdrawal, audit-event, or provenance-thread walkback was run for this contradiction lane.

case_notes.lifecycle_note: The next_pass_brief.md and failure_map.json sidecar keep the memo-only rerun context visible but do not add lifecycle-aware contradiction cases.
case_notes.current_recall_note: The sidecar records the recall rerun boundary, not current recall honesty under contradiction pressure.
case_notes.contradiction_note: The alpha-06 memo rerun did not become a contradiction rerun, so contradiction_map.json remains a blocker signal rather than proof evidence.
